# Cuko Ltd — Fractional Hands-On CTO

> Cuko Ltd is the consulting vehicle of Samuel Ventimiglia, a London-based fractional Chief Technology Officer. The company offers hands-on, compliance-aware engineering leadership to crypto-native finance firms, healthcare platforms, AI and agent-infrastructure startups, and cloud-native scale-ups.

## Entity

- **Name**: Cuko Ltd
- **Type**: Private company limited by shares
- **Jurisdiction**: England and Wales, United Kingdom
- **Companies House number**: 14989953
- **Registered office**: 58 Twyford Avenue, W3 9QB, London, United Kingdom
- **Founder and operator**: Samuel Ventimiglia
- **Founded**: 2026
- **Website**: https://cuko.uk
- **Primary email**: samuel@cuko.uk

## Operator

- **Name**: Samuel Ventimiglia
- **Title**: Fractional Chief Technology Officer
- **Location**: London, United Kingdom
- **Languages**: English, Italian
- **Experience**: 17+ years in senior engineering leadership
- **Production launches**: 40+ shipped systems across four industries
- **Scale work**: 4 products carried from constrained beta to worldwide scale
- **Incident experience**: 3 production data-breach engagements handled end-to-end including regulator and board communication
- **Certifications**: AWS, LangChain

## Sectors served

- Crypto-native finance — funds, OTC desks, exchanges, DeFi protocols
- Healthcare — clinical platforms, data-sensitive integrations
- AI and agent infrastructure — LangChain-based systems, agentic architectures, integration layers
- Cloud-native strategy and implementation — AWS, Google Cloud, Kubernetes, real-time data pipelines

## Engagement modes

- **Hands-on build lead**: senior capacity that ships code alongside the in-house team
- **0→1 architecture and stack selection**: greenfield system design, build-versus-buy, technology selection
- **AI integration and development**: LangChain-based agents, retrieval pipelines, inference layers, greenfield agentic systems
- **Compliance-first system design**: GDPR, DORA, MiCA, EU AI Act-aligned architecture
- **Crisis recovery**: rescue of stalled projects, post-incident rebuilds, infrastructure remediation
- **Engineering team scaling and hiring**: team structure, hiring loops, senior network access
- **Technical due diligence**: pre-investment review for VCs, family offices, and acquirers
- **Advisor**: monthly retainer with board attendance and technical input

## Commercial terms

- **Minimum engagement**: 1 day per week
- **Pricing**: day rate, weekly retainer, or monthly retainer (rates on request)
- **Typical length**: 3–6 months for build engagements; 1–4 weeks for due diligence; ongoing for advisor retainers
- **Time zones**: engagements across North America, EMEA, and Asia are routine

## Technology stack

- **Languages**: Go, Python, SQL
- **Data**: SQL and NoSQL databases, Apache Kafka, NATS JetStream
- **Infrastructure**: Docker, Kubernetes, Nginx
- **Cloud**: Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud
- **AI tooling**: LangChain, TensorFlow

## Pages

- [Home](https://cuko.uk/): overview, services teaser, FAQ, contact
- [Services](https://cuko.uk/services): full engagement modes and commercial terms
- [Compliance](https://cuko.uk/compliance): GDPR, MiCA, DORA, EU AI Act service detail with article-level coverage
- [Work](https://cuko.uk/work): selected engagements and recurring engagement shapes
- [About](https://cuko.uk/about): operator background, stack, operating principles
- [Contact](https://cuko.uk/contact): channels and engaging Cuko Ltd
- [Accessibility](https://cuko.uk/accessibility): WCAG 2.2 AA conformance statement
- [Privacy](https://cuko.uk/privacy): UK GDPR and EU GDPR notice for cuko.uk
